videos.label: Critical Role Stays with D&D — RIP Daggerheart?
videos.description:
Critical Role just dropped a bombshell — Campaign 4 is NOT Daggerheart. Instead, they’re sticking with Dungeons & Dragons. What does this mean for Daggerheart’s future? Is it already dead before it even begins, or is this just a strategic move?

In this video, I break down:

Why Critical Role might have chosen D&D for Campaign 4

What this decision means for the future of Daggerheart

How this impacts the wider TTRPG landscape

Is this the end of Daggerheart before it truly begins… or is there more going on?

👉 What do YOU think: Did Critical Role just kill Daggerheart, or does this make sense for Campaign 4? Drop your thoughts in the comments!

#CriticalRole #Daggerheart #DnD

videos.label: Southern Beaches: Week 1 & 2 - Pathfinder 2e Community Game Update
videos.description:
Southern Beaches is the latest in our line of PF2 Community Mega-Games under the "Northern Reaches" system.

This year -- the adventurers decided to take a much needed vacation from the harsh frozen lands of the reaches and headed south! It's Spring Break at the Serenity Sands Resort!

Welcome to Southern Beaches, a living world of adventure designed exclusively for the patrons of Knights of Last Call. Set on the stunning Coralwind Island, this is your chance to explore mystery and magic, all while shaping the story.

Running from September to the end of the year, Southern Beaches automatically levels your character each week. With gear progression built-in, you’ll always be ready for the next challenge—even if you miss a session.

Ready to join the adventure? Head to patreon.com/knightsoflastcall and sign up at the Champion tier or higher for exclusive access to the Southern Beaches campaign.

videos.label: Have Strahd and D&D met their match?? -A Ravenloft Halloween Special-Dread in the Dark and Dragons
videos.description:
For generations the terrible Count Strahd von Zarovich has ruled over the lands of Barovia and now on the eve of his greatest triumph brave heroes come to try and stop him once and for all!

Welcome to a Halloween special one-shot of Castle Ravenloft! This game was ran with a special guest from our Patreon, our Australian friend Vin!

Rather than using the... traditional.... trappings of dice and minis this game was run using a series of hacks of the Jenga-tower-based Dread RPG, Full/Partial successes and Consequences of Blades in the Dark, and of course.... Dungeon and Dragons :-D

Sit back and enjoy the SPECTACLE OF RAW GOTHIC HORROR COME TO LIFE!!!

videos.label: Beadle & Grimm's Absalom: Gold Edition UNBOXING! Can premium work in PF2??
videos.description:
From the archives!

Several months ago, Beadle & Grimm's was nice enough to send us a copy of their Absalom: Gold Edition to take a look at and review!

Along the way they encounter a new ally who is also investigating the Skinsaw murders for the Lord Mayor of Magnimar himself.

videos.label: Episode  17: "The Skinsaw Man" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
Facing their fear and overcoming the horrors of the Misgivings, the Knights proceed into the ancient crypts of Foxglove Manor to face Aldern Foxglove:  The Skinsaw Man!

0:00 Intro
3:57 Beer of the Week
6:07 The Session

Entering the cursed manor of the Foxglove family, the Knights explored the decaying structure in search for Shalelu Andosana and the mysterious killer known as the Skinsaw Man. Steeped in powerful necromantic energies, the Knights experienced a variety of ghostly hauntings which sapped their will and drove them towards the brink of insanity, but which also gave them insight into the horrible series of events which had occurred in the manor house over the past 100 years. 

Following the sounds of a woman's crying, the Knights found their way to the attic where they discovered the slain form of Iesha Foxglove, Aldern's wife. Killed in a fit of jealousy in the horrible spirit-laden house, Iesha had risen as a revenant - an undead driven to seek revenge - and immediately led the Knights down into the crypts and caverns beneath Foxglove Manor. 

Tearing through the floorboards, Iesha the revenant opened up an ancient passageway to those evil-soaked depths and plunged ahead to seek revenge on her murderous husband. Faced with a yawning pit of darkness, the Knights steeled themselves and began their descent!

Join us for Episode 17: The Skinsaw Man!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 16: "The Misgivings" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights finally arrive at the source of the undead scourge; the old haunted Foxglove Manor - The Misgivings!

0:00 Intro
2:58 Beer of the Week
5:06 Feat and Spell at Level 6 Discussion
19:37 The Session

The Knights have fought back an army of ghouls and now travel to the haunted isolated Foxglove Manor; know throughout the region as 'The Misgivings.' Within they seek to find answers and hope to put a stop to the grisly murders and ghoulish plague that is spreading across the land. Gorre pushes the Knights forward, driven to rescue Shalelu who was taken two nights prior from her room at the Rusty Dragon. Gorre also seeks a confrontation with this, as yet unknown, creature who calls itself 'Your Lordship' and has been taunting and beckoning Gorre to join him and the Pack for several days now through cryptic messages left on the bodies of his victims.

True to its name, the Misgivings is a wicked and haunted house; full of evil spirits and tortured ghosts. 

The Knights will have to contend with the powers of the supernatural and unlock the twisted mysteries of the Foxglove family if they wish to shave Shalelu and put an end to the Skinsaw Murders!

Join us from Episode 16 of the Knights of Last Call: The Misgivings!

videos.label: Episode 15: "The Hungry Dead" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The heroes race to save a family and try to put a stop to the growing hordes of undead that threaten to overrun all of Sandpoint!

0:00 Recap
4:21 Beer of the Week
10:32 Session

The Knights investigation of the series of murders has begun to point towards several facts: the culprit is an undead creature, a ghoul; and the pattern of attacks and the strange notes left by the killer for Gorre point towards an old coastal mansion once occupied by the Foxglove family.

As the heroes returned to Sandpoint to figure out their next course of action, they discovered another attack had occurred! The Rusty Dragon had been breached, one of its employees slain, and Shalelu Andosana had been taken captive. Swearing to rescue his newfound love, Gorre determined to set off for the Misgivings to put an end to this once and for all. 

As the Knights prepared to leave, however, a local farmer rushed into town nearly dead of exhaustion. Panicked, he explained that hordes of ghouls had begun roaming in the countryside surrounding Sandpoint and were gathering to assault a farmstead outside of town at dusk.

With only a few hours until nightfall, the Knights quickly race off to the old Hambly farm in order to face this ghoulish threat head-on and try to do what they can to save the people of Varisia.

Time is running out. Can the Knights stop this ghoulish army? Will they be able to find the true source of this undead plague? What secrets lie buried in the rotting timbers of the Misgivings?

Join us for Episode 15 of the Knights of Last Call: The Hungry Dead!

videos.label: Episode 14: "The Thing In The Attic" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Skinsaw Murders continue in this episode of Rise of the Runelords!

0:00 New Character - Escanor
4:29 Recap
6:52 Beer of the Week
11:34 Session

Just when it seemed that peace and quiet had returned to the small village of Sandpoint, the town was rocked by a series of grisly murders. Carved into the flesh of each of the victims is the Sihedron Rune, the ancient 7-pointed star symbol of ancient Thassilon and their rulers: the Runelords. 

Stranger still, the town's sheriff finds a note attached to one of the victims addressed to Gorre and signed as "Your Lordship."

After investigating the murders and interviewing some of the townsfolk, the Knight begin to believe that a supernatural creature, possibly undead in origin, may be responsible for the deaths. But what connection this killer has to the Runelords or to Gorre remains a mystery.

The Knights decide to leave Sandpoint and head south to Habe's Sanatorium, a remote hospital for the insane. There they hope to question the only known survivor of these recent gruesome attacks and figure out how they can stop this murderer before it kills again!

Join us for this session of the Skinsaw Murders: The Thing in the Attic...

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

THE SKINSAW MURDERS

videos.label: Rune Talk: Burnt Offerings  **SPOILERS**  Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description: Join Bob and Derik as they sit down to discuss the events of the first chapter of the Rise of the Runelords and talk about the Pathfinder 2e game system and their experiences with it so far.

videos.label: Episode 12: "Nualia: Disciple of Wrath  " - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The final battle for Sandpoint is here!

To celebrate this momentous occasion we pulled out all the stops in this episode!

First, home from the military for the holidays, we are joined by Danny (Vilik) in person!

Second, we went all out with a full Dwarven Forge build-out for the final dungeon level and battles!

At long last, the heroes of Sandpoint prepare to confront Nualia within her fortress on Thistletop and defeat her before she can unleash the ancient evil: Malfeshnekor. 

Should they fail, Sandpoint and perhaps all of the Lost Coast will be burnt down and ruined under the power of Nualia and her demonic allies. Only the Knights of Last Call can hope to stop her and save Sandpoint once and for all!

Our Knights, however, have some tricks up their sleeves to even the playing field. Newly acquired Striking runes have greatly empowered the weaponry of the Knights, giving Azeas, Gorre, and Vilik each an additional die of damage when they attack. Additionally, Burl has taken up the Beastmaster archetype (via the free Archetype variant rule) which has enabled Lucky the Badger to become a Mature Animal Companion: granting him medium-size, increased hit points, attack, and damage!

With this episode, Volume 1 of the Rise of the Runelords comes to its conclusion. I want to take this opportunity to thank each and every one of you who has subscribed, liked a video, left a comment, or even just popped in to watch for a few minutes. 

It may not seem like it, but setting up all the lights, cameras, and microphones is quite a pain :D But we continue to do it because of you all who have reached out and told us how much you are enjoying the content.

For all of us here at the Knights of Last Call; thank you so much!

videos.label: Episode 11: "Fury of Ripnugget" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
At long last the epic confrontation that you have been waiting for: Warchief Ripnugget!

Battling their way into Thistletop, the Knights will face down the last of the goblin forces culminating in a final battle with the chief of the Nettlewood goblins himself, Ripnugget!

Slavishly devoted to Nualia, Warchief Ripnugget and his giant lizard mount, Stickfoot, are the final guardians before the Knights can enter into the Thistletop Dungeons and confront Nualia herself.

Join us for an episode full of non-stop action and bloody combat!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 10: "Assault on Thistletop" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
After battling their way through the tangled boughs and thorns of the Nettlewood, The Knights of Last Call begin their assault on Thistletop island and the goblin fortress that defends it! Pressed on by the imminent threat of Nualia and the release of the powerful evil fiend, Malfeshnekor, the heroes waste no time in beginning their attack intent on destroying the goblins once and for all. 

Great danger lies ahead for our heroes for while the forces of the goblins may be depleted their greatest champions: Ripnugget and Bruthazamus still await to face the Knights... and deep within the island's dungeon: Nualia herself!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 09: "Journey to Thistletop" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

After defeating the Catacombs of Wrath and putting an end (albeit temporary) to the Runewell beneath Sandpoint, the Knights have little time to reflect on their next move as they now know that Nualia is planning a second attack on Sandpoint, this time lead by a powerful demonic entity of wrath known as Malfeshnekor.

The Knights resolve to journey to Thistletop and put an end to Nualia, her plans, and the goblin-threat once and for all; but this is no easy feat.

Thistletop lies several miles away from Sandpoint just off the coast; however, it is surrounded by a dense tangled forest of thorns and vines known as the Nettlewood. 

To reach Thistletop, the Knight must first make their way through the labyrinthine maze of nettles and briars and face whatever defenses Nualia and the goblins have mustered. 

The clock is ticking and the fate of Sandpoint, and perhaps all of Varisia, hangs in the balance!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 08: "Legacy of Wrath" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights finish their exploration of the Catacombs of Wrath; finally confronting its ancient and deadly guardian. In the depths beneath Sandpoint, the Knights of Last Call will battle to defeat the minions of Lamashtu and quell the awakened evil power that has been secretly sleeping in the earth for millennia: the Runewell.

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 07: "Curse of Lamashtu" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

In this episode, the Knights continue their exploration of the Cathedral of Wrath! After his encounter with the sinspawn and their touch of wrath, Azeas reveals his secret past to the rest of the Knights and embraces his warrior past and deep-seated anger issues. 

Deeper inside the dungeon, the Knights come face to face with the horrible power of the Mother of Monsters and what terrible fate awaits the citizens of Sandpoint if they cannot stop this ancient evil!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: GenCon: A History and Retrospective
videos.description:
Join us for a short behind-the-scenes video shot before the session got underway. A discussion about the battlemat brings up GenCon, the world's largest gaming convention. Derik and Matt proceed to explain their history with GenCon and the history BEHIND GenCon itself. Who knows, maybe a future episode of Knights will be shot on-location at GenCon itself! 

We can only hope!

videos.label: Episode 06: "Cathedral of Wrath" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

In this episode, the Knights rescue Ameiko and begin to learn the terrible history of Sandpoint and the identity of the secret villain behind the attacks on Sandpoint! This foe, once a citizen of Sandpoint, was corrupted, like so many others, by an ancient evil that lay beneath the very foundations of Sandpoint. 

Now that evil has awoken and threatens to destroy the town! 

Steeling themselves for a journey into darkness, the Knights descend down into the Glasswork smuggling tunnels to enter the ancient and wicked Cathedral of Wrath!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 05: "Time to Kick Some Glass" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

The sudden disappearance of Ameiko and a mysterious letter left behind by her prodigal half-brother Tsuto leads the Knights to believe that the Kaijitsu family may be behind the goblin attack on Sandpoint! Rushing to the Glassworks to get some answers, the Knights are about to learn some stunning revelations and begin to uncover an ancient secret that has been buried for thousands of years!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

If you've stuck with us through our first few episodes, THANK YOU SO MUCH! We are constantly trying to improve the audio and visual quality of our games, as well as make sure the content is as much fun as we can make it. I know there are a lot of gaming podcasts out there, but our goal with this channel is to show a "real table" in-play as much as possible. No virtual tabletop, no professional studio, just a bunch of friends gathered around a real table and playing games. It's not always perfect, sometimes the minis are stand-ins, sometimes the battle mat is a hastily scribbled mess, and often the conversation drifts towards small talk and tangents. 

In my experience, this is just the way it really goes with a real group of gamers!

If nothing else, I hope that you take away from these shows is that your group is just like our group! We are not professional actors, I'm not a 'professional DM', we are just a group of friends getting together to roll some dice and have fun!

Cheer!
-Derik

videos.label: Episode 04: "Something Sinister in Sandpoint" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

In this episode, the Knights answer the call of Sheriff Hemlock and Father Zantus to investigate the Sandpoint Boneyard and discover what has happened in the crypts of Desna; and once inside they begin to see that this was no mere goblin attack, but a diversion for a larger... and more nefarious plot!

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 03: "Local Heroes" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 


Designed to take characters from level 1 to 20 over the span of 6 harrowing adventures, what begins as a small goblin attack on a backwater town soon turns into a race against an ancient evil force attempting to secure dominion over the world!

Victorious in the Battle of Sandpoint the Knights come to earn the respect and admiration of the entire town. Everyone is eager to toast their newest heroes, especially Aldern Foxglove who develops a bit of hero-worship of the Knights after they save his life. Taking in what the town has to offer, the Knights spend a few days relaxing and enjoying the hospitality of Sandpoint's citizens until old wounds resurface and the celebration of victory fades under the realization that something much larger, and more nefarious, was behind the goblin attack...

Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 02: "Festival & Fire" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call continue their epic adventure! Join us as we take on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 


Designed to take characters from level 1 to 20 over the span of 6 harrowing adventures, what begins as a small goblin attack on a backwater town soon turns into a race against an ancient evil force attempting to secure dominion over the world!


The annual Swallowtail festival has been interrupted by a sudden attack of vicious, flame-wielding goblins! After defending the townsfolk in Sandpoint's central square, the Knights rush to the Rusty Dragon to make sure their favorite inn (and its owner, Ameiko) are safe! More battles ensue,  and this leads to a chance encounter with a nobleman from Magnimar. If the Knights can manage to save him and the town, they will have earned the gratitude of a powerful and wealthy lord and the entire populace of Sandpoint!


Welcome to the Knights of Last Call!

videos.label: Episode 01: "Sandpoint Needs You!" - Pathfinder 2e Actual Play - Rise of the Runelords
videos.description:
The Knights of Last Call begin their epic adventure! We embark on the legendary Rise of the Runelords adventure path, updated for the second edition of Paizo's Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. 

Designed to take characters from level 1 to 20 over the span of 6 harrowing adventures, what begins as a small goblin attack on a backwater town soon turns into a race against an ancient evil force attempting to secure dominion over the world!

In this first session, you are introduced to the player characters and to the town and inhabitants of Sandpoint. A small village in the hinterlands of Varisia, Sandpoint has always been a quiet and untroubled spot but that is all about to change and the Knights have arrived just in time!

Thank you for joining us, welcome to the Knights of Last Call!
